salesPricing.description1: We set things up around how your offers already arrive.
salesPricing.description2: Your volume, markets, and workflow shape the rollout.

proposal.title: Request access
proposal.description: We work with a limited number of dealers at launch. Tell us how your offers arrive and we will map the right setup.

hero.title: Pricing built around your intake
hero.description: We do not offer fixed public plans at launch. Each setup depends on your offer volume, supplier flow, markets, workflow, and support needs.

drivers.title: What the setup depends on
drivers.description: We structure pricing around the inputs that shape rollout, intake control, and support.

volume.title: Offer volume
volume.description: How many supplier offers, vehicles, or sourcing requests your team handles.

markets.title: Target markets
markets.description: Countries, regions, and supplier access required.

workflow.title: Workflow setup
workflow.description: Upload flow, managed access, API access, or internal process support.

support.title: Support level

process.title: How rollout works
process.description: A simple process to understand fit and move quickly.

engagement.title: Ways to run it
engagement.description: No public prices. Choose the setup that matches your operation.

automatic.title: Automatic access
automatic.description: We process offers on your behalf and send back the result, so your team can act without handling the intake workflow manually.

managed.title: Managed access
managed.description: Your users or members can upload offers themselves and manage the intake process directly inside Auto-margin.

api.title: Enterprise API access
api.description: Get API access, an API key, and documentation so your team can build its own intake workflow on top of Auto-margin.

FAQ.title: Direct answers.
FAQ.homeDescription: If you can't find what you need, write us. We answer within one business day.
FAQ.contactPrefix: If you can't find what you're looking for,

what.a: AutoMargin helps dealers review incoming offers faster and focus on better deals. You upload the offers you already receive, and AutoMargin shows which cars create margin, which ones will sit, and which ones are already placed.

identify.q: How does it identify the best deals?
identify.a: It checks each offer against current market context and turns it into a clear next step. You see which cars are worth acting on and which suppliers consistently bring the right stock.

files.a: PDF, Excel, Word, Google Sheets, and emails - including mixed formats in one batch. Our auto-forwarding handles the rest. Just send it and we parse it.

audience.a: Independent dealers, trading companies, and B2B marketplaces who handle high volumes of offers and want tighter control over intake, supplier quality, and margin.

trial.q: Can I try AutoMargin before choosing a plan?
trial.a: You can use the public demo with text input to see how AutoMargin works. Account access or a trial period is planned directly with our team after we understand your intake workflow, volume, and supplier setup.

security.a: Absolutely. Your files are encrypted, processed in secure environments, and never shared with third parties.

prices.q: Can I trust the market prices?
prices.a: Yes. We cross-check against live marketplace listings across Europe and refresh the data regularly, so your team works from current market movement instead of static guesses.

start.a: Submit your request through our contact form or by email, and our team will walk you through the setup. Most users get started the same day.

Contact.title: We're here to help.
Contact.description: Tell us what you need and we'll route your request to the right person. We typically respond within 1 business day.

nextSteps.title: Guides to get started
nextSteps.description: Explore the quickest path depending on what you're looking for.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.description: Get quick answers about the product, plans, and how the demo works.

hero.title: Built around how dealers actually make money
hero.subtitle: Less time reviewing cars. More time making deals.
hero.body1: Most dealers spend their time reviewing cars: comparing listings, checking prices, and second-guessing decisions. That is not where money is made.
hero.body2: AutoMargin removes the analysis. You upload the offers you already receive and quickly see which cars make money, which ones will sit, which ones are already placed, and which suppliers fit your business.

team.title: The team
team.p1: We're a lean, founder-owned team of car-industry operators and builders. We focus on one thing: helping dealers control intake through better supplier decisions.
team.p2: The product is built around a simple shift: stop working on cars and start working with suppliers.
team.p3: That means less reviewing, faster calls, and better deals.

product.p1: This is not a pricing tool. It is a way to control intake and decide faster what belongs in stock.
product.p2: The real value is knowing who brings you margin, who sends volume without profit, and how to build a supplier network that makes you money.

Footer.slogan: Build the network behind your margin.
